action_set_definitions.name: get_environment_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current state of the environment, including inspection progress, battery levels, and active anomalies.

action_set_definitions.name: fetch_maintenance_records
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves all digital and digitized 'dirty fingerprint' records for a specific component serial number, including technical logs and release certificates.

serial_number.description: The unique serial number of the aircraft component.

action_set_definitions.name: reconcile_cycle_counts
action_set_definitions.description: Performs a mathematical audit comparing the cycles recorded in technical logs against those on authorized release certificates (e.g., FAA 8130-3 or EASA Form 1).

action_set_definitions.name: audit_traceability_chain
action_set_definitions.description: Verifies the full back-to-birth chain of ownership and checks for the presence of Non-Incident Statements (NIS) for every transfer of the component.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_regulatory_resolution
action_set_definitions.description: Follows regulatory protocols to resolve gaps in documentation or cycle discrepancies. This is used when the audit finds missing information.

gap_type.description: The type of trace gap identified.

action_set_definitions.name: update_component_status
action_set_definitions.description: Finalizes the component status in the maintenance system as either 'CLEARED' for reinstallation or 'REJECTED'.

state_description.inspection_progress: Percentage of the total inspection task completed.
state_description.component_health_status: A mapping of aircraft components (e.g., 'engine_1', 'left_wing_flaps') to their ground-truth integrity values (0.0 to 1.0).
state_description.active_anomalies: A list of currently existing faults or issues discovered or undiscovered.
state_description.agent_location: The current zone or coordinate of the inspection agent relative to the aircraft.
state_description.battery_level: Remaining energy percentage of the inspection drone or mobile platform.
state_description.maintenance_access_panels: Status of panels (open/closed) required to access internal components.
